name_cn:
『Balenciaga Balenciaga』
New Gossip Crossbody Bag!
The new Gossip bag is stylish, featuring a front flap with a BB logo and vintage hardware. It feels premium and cool, perfect for daily wear, blending fashion with a casual vibe.
A must-have new favorite~🤩
Small: 19x10x6.9cm, Model: 9522
